_note: Editable catalog. Coordinates are resolved at build time via Places API (do NOT hand-edit coords here). cat/sub/desc/map are the curated fields.

places.name: Promenade Beach
places.desc: A 1.5 km long stretch along the Bay of Bengal, perfect for evening strolls with French colonial architecture.

places.name: Pondy Marina Beach
places.desc: Rip off of a beach in Chennai. Still worth visiting though.

places.name: Paradise Beach
places.desc: A pristine beach accessible by boat, known for its golden sands and clear waters.

places.name: Serenity Beach
places.desc: Popular surfing destination with laid-back beach shacks and surf schools.

places.name: Sri Aurobindo Ashram
places.desc: Founded in 1926, this spiritual community attracts seekers from around the world.

places.name: Marbling Group
places.desc: The marbling unit of Sti Aurobindo Ashram produces sarees, scarves, dupattas and many more items on pure silk or pure silk. chiffon

places.name: Sacred Heart Basilica
places.desc: Gothic-style church built in the 1900s, featuring beautiful stained glass panels.

places.name: Manakula Vinayagar Temple
places.desc: 300-year-old temple dedicated to Lord Ganesha, known for its elephant Lakshmi.

places.name: Botanical Garden
places.desc: 22-acre garden dating back to 1826, featuring rare plant species and musical fountains.

places.name: Chunnambar Boat House
places.desc: Backwater paradise offering boating experiences through mangrove forests.

places.name: Oussudu Lake (Ousteri Lake)
places.desc: An important wetlands and migratory location home to over 200 species of birds. Popular destination for birdwatchers!

places.name: Auroville Bird Park
places.desc: Le Paradise D' Auro is a bird park and petting zoo open to visitors of all ages.

places.name: Kizhoor Referendum Monument
places.desc: Historic monument marking the independence of Pondicherry from the French and its merger with the Indian Union in 1962.

places.name: Arikamedu
places.desc: Ruins of a Roman trading post established in 2nd Century BCE.

places.name: Mahakavi Bharathiyar Memorial Centre
places.desc: Museum in the former home of renowned writer & activist Mahakavi Bharathiyar, featuring historical artifacts & more.

places.name: Puducherry Museum
places.desc: Quaint museum known for its rare sculpture collection, including ancient bronze & stone artifacts.

places.name: Tasmai a Centre for Art & Culture
places.desc: A platform for contemporary visual art connecting Pondicherry with the world through art and culture understood in the widest and deepest sense.

places.name: Art and Craft Village
places.desc: A witness to the cultural and artistic heritage of India, this venture was conceptualized in the vision of preserving and patronizing traditional Indian art and crafts while creating space for modern-day artistic expression.

places.name: Temple Adventures - Scuba Diving Experience Centre
Hotel Madurai Veedu
places.desc: A top restaurant serving high-quality South Indian dishes in a family-friendly atmosphere.

places.name: Nalla Thambi Mess
places.desc: Offers a delightful culinary experience steeped in traditional flavors and is renowned for its authentic South Indian dishes.

places.name: Hotel Sri Kamatchi
places.desc: Authentic Non-Veg Restaurant | Kamatchi Special Meals Some meals don't just fill your stomach - they take you back to tradition.

places.name: Hotel Sri Kamatchi, White Town branch
places.desc: White Town Branch of the famous Hotel Sri Kamatchi.

places.name: Ende Nadu
places.desc: Authentic Kerala cuisine right here in Pondicherry.

places.name: Kamireddy Foods
places.desc: Affordable, tasty, and huge variety of non-vegetarian dishes.

places.name: Kushi Hyderabadi Biriyani
places.desc: The best Hyderabadi Dum Biriyani in the city.

places.name: Kongu Kitchen
places.desc: Offers Kongunadu Cuisine from 50 towns in the North Western part of Tamil Nadu like Coimbatore and neighboring areas like Salem, Erode, Tirupur and Dindugul.

places.name: Maison Perumal Hotel & Restaurant
places.desc: Savor Franco-Tamil cuisine at Maison Perumal with terrace & courtyard dining,

places.name: Sri Murugan Cafe
places.desc: Small outlet serving only the best vegetarian South-Indian food.

places.name: Surguru Restaurant
places.desc: One of the all time classics, serving a huge range of South-Indian vegetarian food.

places.name: Punjabi Dhaba
places.desc: Pondicherry's little slice of Amritsar.

places.name: Dilliwaala6
places.desc: A colourful vegetarian restaurant with a wide array of North-Indian dishes.

places.name: Bro's plan B
places.desc: Delicious, affordable North-Indian food in Auroville.

places.name: Just Parathas
places.desc: As the name suggests, come here for their delectable parathas.

places.name: Kokonut Lagoon
places.desc: In their own words, "Mallufied ambience with delicious Kerala cuisine in Pondicherry"

places.name: Copper Kitchen
places.desc: Chennai's favourite multicuisine restaurant chain.

places.name: Prawn and Crab
places.desc: Indulge in the freshest seafood delights at Prawn and Crab - The House of Seafood, Pondicherry's premier seafood restaurant!

places.name: Terrassen Cafe
places.desc: Family-friendly vegan restaurant and vegetarian cafe serving a diverse menu inspired by Mediterranean, North Indian, Italian, and American cuisines.

places.name: Conscious Cafe
places.desc: Experience artisanal vegetarian & vegan food and beverages made with conscious ingredients at Conscious Cafe Auroville.

places.name: Hope Cafe
places.desc: Get tiny bites and beverages in this artistic café.

places.name: Cafe des Arts
places.desc: This 19th-century building with vintage decor & garden seating offers French cafe fare & coffee.

places.name: Hot Breads
places.desc: Try it for a variety of breads, pastries, and cookies. Very popular amongst the locals.

places.name: Bread & Chocolate
places.desc: Lively rooftop cafe that servers French pastries.

places.name: Mira
places.desc: From traditional South Indian spices to contemporary European culinary techniques, the dishes on offer transcend borders and expectations.

places.name: Cafe 73
places.desc: Café known for its burgers and dishes named after motorcycles.

places.name: Daddy Amma Momo Shop
places.desc: Rumoured to be the best momos in Pondy.

places.name: Gelato Artigianale Italiano
places.desc: Italian-style gelateria serving handcrafted gelato in classic and seasonal flavors.

places.name: Tipsy cream
places.desc: Dessert spot known for creative ice creams and alcohol-infused frozen treats.

places.name: Zuka
places.desc: Snug desert shop offering decadent cakes, homemade chocolates, and other sweets.

places.name: Villa Shanti Hotel Restaurant
places.desc: Refined restaurant blending Indian and European flavors within a heritage hotel setting.

places.name: Pavilion
places.desc: Luxury hotel restaurant offering an upscale multi-cuisine dining experience with polished service.

places.name: Anthé Restaurant
places.desc: Fine-dining venue focusing on modern Indian cuisine with curated menus and elegant presentation.

places.name: Mel Whisks
places.desc: A very happening bar with lots of great food options, fun activities, and karaoke nights.

places.name: Catamaran Brewing Company
places.desc: Pondicherry's craft brewery offering house-brewed beers, pub food, and a vibrant social setting.

places.name: Asian House Pub
places.desc: Offers a unique blend of Asian-inspired cuisine and a lively nightlife experience.

places.name: Bike & Barrel
places.desc: Fashioned as an English pub in Puducherry, Bike & Barrel is the place to hit with your friends for a pint of beer!

places.name: Cantos Social House
places.desc: A calm, community-driven third place with 300+ board games, arts and creativity, informal co-working, and slow social time, without the pressure to buy anything.

places.name: Jallikattu Restaurant
places.desc: Seafood-forward sit-down restaurant directly opposite the Chunnambar Boat House serving prawns, fried fish and biryani.

places.name: Le Pondy
places.desc: Open-air multicuisine restaurant at the riverside Le Pondy resort with a weekend buffet lunch by the Chunnambar estuary.

places.name: Finz - Seafood & Barbeque
places.desc: Sea-facing seafood and barbecue restaurant at Club Mahindra resort, open to day guests for lunch.

places.name: Aayi Mandapam
places.desc: White Greco-Roman water monument from Napoleon III's era at the centre of Bharathi Park.

places.name: Our Lady of Angels Church
places.desc: Baby-pink Greco-Roman church on Rue Dumas in White Town, one of Pondicherry's oldest.

places.name: Immaculate Conception Cathedral
places.desc: White-and-blue 18th-century cathedral, mother church of the Pondicherry-Cuddalore archdiocese.

places.name: Old Lighthouse
places.desc: Decommissioned 1836 French-era lighthouse tower on the seafront promenade near the Gandhi statue.

places.name: Bay of Buddha
places.desc: Rooftop pan-Asian restaurant atop The Promenade Hotel with sweeping sea-promenade and lighthouse views at sunset.

places.name: Le Dupleix
places.desc: Heritage hotel restaurant in an 18th-century mansion serving French and Creole seafood with candle-lit courtyard dining.

places.name: Aurodhan Art Gallery
places.desc: Long-running gallery in a heritage building showing contemporary, tribal and folk art plus cultural events.

places.name: Cluny Embroidery Centre
places.desc: Embroidery centre run by Cluny nuns since 1829 in an 18th-century bungalow, selling hand-embroidered linens.

places.name: Romain Rolland Library
places.desc: Public library founded in 1827, one of India's oldest, holding rare French manuscripts in White Town.

places.name: Upasana Design Studio
places.desc: Auroville slow-fashion textile studio and shop offering handloom khadi and natural-dyed sustainable apparel.

places.name: Puducherry Science Centre & Planetarium
places.desc: NCSM science centre with a digital planetarium, fun-science galleries and a kids' corner.

places.name: Jawahar Toy Museum
places.desc: Small free museum on the promenade displaying 120+ costume dolls from across Indian states.

places.name: Pogo Land
places.desc: Water park and amusement park with slides, pools and rides on Vazhudavoor Road near Ousteri Lake.

places.name: Pondy Ocean Park
places.desc: Adventure park near Paradise Beach with land and water activities, a funzone and mangrove boating.

places.name: Savitri Bhavan
places.desc: Auroville study-and-art centre on Sri Aurobindo's epic Savitri, with a picture gallery and quiet amphitheatre.

places.name: Auroville Visitor Centre
places.desc: Main arrival hub for Auroville with exhibitions, a Matrimandir model, boutiques and cafes; issues Matrimandir passes.

places.name: Sadhana Forest
places.desc: Volunteer-run reforestation and vegan eco-community offering free walk-in tours of its restored forest.

places.name: Bharat Nivas (Auroville)
places.desc: Auroville's Pavilion of Indian culture, housing the SAWCHU hall and Kala Kendra art centre.

places.name: Kallialay Surf School
places.desc: Long-running surf school at Serenity Beach offering lessons, board rentals and SUP for all levels.

places.name: L'Aqua
places.desc: Rooftop lounge bar with a pool atop Ajanta Sea View Hotel on Beach Road, serving cocktails overlooking the rock beach.

places.name: Le Café
places.desc: Iconic 24-hour seafront heritage cafe on the Promenade rock beach, a popular late-night hangout.
